title: GMaps Full Scraper Input
description: Search Google Maps and extract full business details including email.

query.title: Search Query
query.description: Google Maps search query, e.g. 'auto body shop Brooklyn NY'

geoTiles.title: Geo Tiles
geoTiles.description: Optional array of search queries for geo-tiling (overrides query when provided)

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of listings to process per query (max 120)

includeSocial.title: Scrape Instagram / Facebook
includeSocial.description: If a business lists Instagram or Facebook as their website, attempt to scrape contact info from it. Uses browser + proxy — costs more. Default off.
